setupGuide.notes: AMS2 ships Estoril as Cascais_1988; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept.

track.realVenue: Autodromo Internazionale Enzo e Dino Ferrari

setupGuide.notes: Placeholder for Detroit Street Circuit — 63 laps / 253.4 km reproduced as 80 laps of Long Beach. Long Beach preserves the era's American street-race character.
Placeholder for Circuit Paul Ricard — 53 laps / 307.9 km reproduced as 74 laps of Le Mans Circuit Bugatti. Keeps the French GP at a French Grand Prix venue.
No 1985 Silverstone layout in AMS2; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept on the era-closest 1975 layout.
Placeholder for the 1984 Nürburgring GP-Strecke — 67 laps / 304.3 km reproduced as 59 laps of the modern Nürburgring GP (Veedol). Same venue, later layout.
AMS2 ships the Österreichring as Spielberg Historic; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept.
Placeholder for Circuit Zandvoort (not in AMS2) — 70 laps / 297.6 km reproduced as 74 laps of Zolder, a period-correct Benelux road circuit that hosted 1980s Grands Prix.
No 1985 Monza in AMS2; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept on the era-matching 1991 layout.
No 1985 Spa layout in AMS2; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept on the 1993 layout.
Brands Hatch is real in AMS2 (modern GP layout); the historical lap count is kept.
AMS2 ships Kyalami Classic as Kyalami Historic; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept.
